features: Formula contains consumer proven optical enhancers that provide a temporary effect
Recommended to cover wider areas of thinning, scalp show-through and even bald spots
This clinically proven formula is gentle and safe for everyday use
description: Product Description The unique blend of polishing agents in the whitening system accelerates whiteness and helps lift stains and plaque whilst the Pro-Shine complex and gentle pink dye gives an instant optical whitening effect and gloss, perfect for a finishing touch. Ingredients Hydrogenated Starch Hydrolysate, Aqua, Hydrated Silica, Glycerin, Alumina, Sodium Dodecylbenzenesulfonate, PEG-12, Aroma, Perlite, Sodium Monofluorophosphate, Pentapotassium Triphosphate, Cellulose Gum, Sodium Saccharin, Cocamidropropyl Betaine, Ammonium Hydroxide, Alcohol, Pentasodium Triphosphate, Maltodextrin, Pearl Powder, Limonene, CI 45430, CI 75470, CI 77491, Contains Sodium Monoflurophosphate (1300 ppm F) Directions Treat teeth with the product to instantly get whiter teeth. Safety Warning For external use only. Do not swallow. In case of contact with eyes, rinse immediately with water. Discontinue use if irritation occurs. Consult a dentist if pregnant or under other specific medical conditions. Manufacturer Contact Information Church & Dwight UK Ltd., Folkestone, CT19 6PG, UK.
